reason: Question asks if a motorcycle delivering goods to enterprises in the sign's zone may proceed; answer 3 'Дозволено' (permitted) reflects the exception (signs 3.3-3.7 don't apply to vehicles servicing enterprises in the zone). Sign is the no-motorcycles prohibition. Wikimedia File:UA road sign 3.6.svg verified visually: black motorcycle in red circle. PNG also saved as 40_9.png.
